assertions.scriptName: timestamp minus interval subtracts day components
timestamp minus interval subtracts month components
timestamp plus interval uses calendar month semantics
timestamptz plus interval uses calendar month semantics
assertions.query:
SELECT extract(epoch FROM
						(timestamp with time zone '2025-01-31 12:00:00+00' + interval '1 month'))::bigint::text;

assertions.scriptName: date plus interval uses calendar month semantics
interval plus date uses calendar month semantics
interval plus timestamp uses calendar month semantics
interval plus timestamptz uses calendar month semantics
assertions.query:
SELECT extract(epoch FROM
						(interval '1 month' + timestamp with time zone '2025-01-31 12:00:00+00'))::bigint::text;

assertions.scriptName: date minus interval uses calendar month semantics
timestamptz minus interval subtracts day components
assertions.query:
SELECT extract(epoch FROM
						(timestamp with time zone '2025-07-21 04:05:06+00' - interval '2 days'))::bigint::text;

assertions.scriptName: timestamptz minus interval subtracts month components
assertions.query:
SELECT extract(epoch FROM
						(timestamp with time zone '2025-03-31 12:00:00+00' - interval '1 month'))::bigint::text;
